# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

parameters:
  - name: managedIdentityName
    type: string
    defaultValue: identityForFunctions
  
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('storageAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/34e09817-6cbe-4dac-a864-5a3a1b3fbc2e'
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/', variables('storageAccountName'), '/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identities/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/storageAccountName
  
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/93716551-82a2-4b4e-9bf2-6dc2c87ee791'
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/', variables('keyVaultName'), '/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identities/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/keyVaultName
  
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('sqlServerName'), '/', variables('databaseName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/4d97b98b-1d4f-4787-a291-c67834d212e7'
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.Sql/servers/', variables('sqlServerName'), '/databases/', variables('databaseName'), '/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identities/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.Sql/servers/sqlServerName
  
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: "[concat(variables('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/Microsoft.Authorization/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/ef62cd15-ff8b-425f-b29d-377d7c905fa3'
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/', variables('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/identities/', parameters('managedIdentityName'))).principalId]"
    dependsOn:
      - Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/cosmosDbAccountName
